downloaded_assets.title: Modern Multi-Monitor Trading Desk
downloaded_assets.description: A cinematic shot of a trading desk with multiple monitors displaying stock charts
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Close-up cinematic shot of three computer monitors on a dark desk. The center monitor shows a detailed candlestick stock chart with red and green bars. The surrounding monitors show data analytics and white backgrounds. Soft ambient lighting, shallow depth of field.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant dark grays and blacks with vibrant pops of 'finance green' (#10b981) and 'market red' from the charts. Fits dark mode perfectly.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Professional trading desk with stock market charts on multiple monitors
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly captures the 'professional and technical' mood requested for a stock analysis app.

downloaded_assets.title: Trader Analyzing Charts
downloaded_assets.description: Side profile of a trader working at a professional multi-monitor setup
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Side view of a person at a white desk using multiple monitors. One monitor clearly shows a candlestick chart. The lighting is natural but the monitors provide a cool glow. More 'human' and 'active' than the empty desk shot.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Neutral tones with bright screen highlights. Cooler color temperature.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Trader analyzing financial charts on a multi-monitor computer setup
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: A strong alternative if a human element is preferred in the hero section.

downloaded_assets.title: Dark Finance Gradient
downloaded_assets.description: Subtle dark gradient with emerald and teal highlights
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A very soft, out-of-focus abstract mesh gradient. Deep black and navy corners transition into a vibrant emerald green glow in the bottom right. Extremely smooth transitions with no noise.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Perfect match for the emerald primary #10b981 and slate background theme. Provides depth without distraction.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Subtle dark emerald green and navy blue abstract gradient background
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Matches the requested 'emerald' theme perfectly. Ideal for sections needing subtle visual depth.

downloaded_assets.title: Stock App on Smartphone
downloaded_assets.description: Close-up of a mobile stock trading interface on a dark background
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Extreme close-up of a high-end smartphone screen in a dark room. The screen displays a financial app with a list of stocks, radar icons, and stock tickers. The UI is dark and technical.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Deep blacks with sharp white and yellow text. Technical, clean aesthetic.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Close-up of a stock market trading app on a mobile phone screen
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by StockRadars Co., on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfect for a 'mobile features' card. Clean, dark, and highly relevant to stock analysis.

downloaded_assets.title: Mobile Stock Chart
downloaded_assets.description: Smartphone in hand displaying a stock market graph with a green background
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A hand holding a smartphone against a dark background. The screen displays a large green stock chart with a clear 'upward' trend. A lush green plant is visible in the background, reinforcing the 'green' growth theme.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Bright finance green chart highlights against a dark UI. Warm skin tones and green background accents.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Smartphone displaying a green stock market growth chart in hand
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by StockRadars Co., on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: A great alternative that focuses on 'growth' and 'success' with the green chart visualization.

downloaded_assets.title: Apple Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official Apple logo in dark theme
downloaded_assets.visual_description: White Apple silhouette on transparent background
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Official brand mark for Apple stock analysis.

css_textures.description: Subtle dot pattern for a technical, data-focused feel
css_textures.recommended_for: The main analysis area or chart containers
css_textures.combine_with: Layer over a dark slate background

css_textures.description: Soft radial gradients to add depth to the hero section
css_textures.recommended_for: Hero container behind the trading desk image

usage_notes: Use SiApple, SiNasdaq, etc. from react-icons/si for small UI elements like table cells or chips.
The hero-trading-desk-1 image is the recommended primary hero for its professional, dark aesthetic.
The bg-abstract-gradient-1 is specifically chosen to complement the emerald (#10b981) primary color.
Avoid stretching logos; use object-contain for all logo containers.
